name_en: ❤️ This B-brand pure original body is crafted from imported custom-smooth Italian tanned topstitched calfskin. The leather is soft and glossy with clear grain, offering a particularly comfortable feel and a high-end look. It features a Thomas Burberry exclusive gold hardware logo on the front and a leather-covered mirror charm, very understated yet distinctive. The open-top design comes with a lobster clasp and a canvas lining with patch pockets and a zippered interior pocket. It has a huge capacity—fitting another bag inside is no problem—and is comfortable to carry. Suitable for travel, work, and business trips. It looks good however you carry it, featuring a unique lazy retro style, a perfect accessory for street style. Plus, this bag is durable, easy to clean, and timeless. It looks very elegant and is a very practical style suitable for all seasons. Don't miss out!
